sections.paragraph:
m. לֶהָבָה Num 21:28, and לַהֶבֶת 1Sa 17:7, fem.; pl. לְהָבֹות Psa 105:32, const. לַהֲבֹות Psa 29:7.

(1) flame, Joe 2:5 Job 41:13.

(2) flaming, i.e. glittering steel, in brightness resembling a flame, i.e. the point of a spear, or sword, 1Sa 17:7 Nab. 3:3; Job 39:23 also used absol. of a naked sword, Jud. 3:22 see also שַׁלְהֶבֶת and לַבָּה .
